feature: MCP health check: block metadata and link-local addresses by resolving the host
workflow_rationale: Single-service security fix with well-defined acceptance criteria and no dependencies between services

phases.name: Implementation and Testing
phases.description: Add URL host validation to block SSRF attacks via link-local, reserved, multicast, and unspecified IP addresses

subtasks.description: Create URL host validation helper function in git.py

verification.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'apps/web-server'); from server.routes.git import _validate_mcp_url_host; print('Helper function imported successfully')"

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Helper resolves hostname and checks ALL resolved addresses against blocked ranges
AC2: Loopback (127.0.0.1, ::1) is allowed and checked BEFORE reserved
AC3: Private ranges (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16) remain allowed
AC4: Unresolvable host returns validation failure
AC5: Helper can be called by check_mcp_health with URL string

subtasks.description: Integrate validation helper into check_mcp_health endpoint

verification.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'apps/web-server'); from server.routes.git import check_mcp_health; print('Endpoint imports successfully')"

acceptance_criteria: AC5: check_mcp_health returns status=unknown when URL is refused (no reason exposed)
AC5: Reason is logged to logger, not returned to client
Existing behavior preserved for allowed URLs

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite for MCP health check validation
acceptance_criteria: AC6: Test covers 169.254.169.254 (AWS metadata, blocked)
AC6: Test covers IPv6 link-local literal (blocked)
AC6: Test covers file:// scheme (blocked)
AC6: Test covers http://localhost (allowed)
AC6: Test covers http://127.0.0.1 (allowed)
AC6: Test covers private 10.x address (allowed)
AC6: Test covers public hostname (allowed if resolves to public IP)
Tests verify status=unknown response (no reason exposed)
Tests verify reason is logged
All 6 acceptance criteria from spec are met
All existing tests continue to pass
New test file passes all tests
No security vulnerabilities in validation logic
Hostname resolution handles IPv4 and IPv6
Blocked IP ranges are properly validated

verification_steps.name: Unit Tests
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests pass, including AC1-AC6 coverage

verification_steps.name: Integration Test - check_mcp_health endpoint
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Endpoint properly rejects dangerous URLs and allows safe ones

verification_steps.name: Security Validation
verification_steps.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'apps/web-server'); from server.routes.git import _validate_mcp_url_host; import socket; print('Validation:', _validate_mcp_url_host('http://169.254.169.254/'))"

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low-risk security fix with well-defined acceptance criteria. Requires unit tests (helper function), integration tests (endpoint behavior), and security validation (IP range blocking works correctly).
